---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
date: ""
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
turnout_income <- readRDS("~/Desktop/final-project-Smlfberry/data/turnout_income.rds")
il_counties <- readRDS("data/il_counties.rds")
il_counties_pct <- readRDS("data/il_counties_pct.rds")

il_counties_pct_sf <- il_counties %>%
  left_join(st_drop_geometry(il_counties_pct), by = "GEOID") %>%
  mutate(pct_college = pct_bachelors + pct_grad)
```

```{r join data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
il_combined <- il_counties_pct_sf %>%
  left_join(st_drop_geometry(turnout_income %>% filter(state == "IL")), 
            by = c("GEOID" = "geoid")) %>%
  mutate(
    pct_college = pct_bachelors + pct_grad,
    low_income = median_income < quantile(median_income, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    low_edu = pct_college < 18,
    category = case_when(
      low_income & low_edu ~ "Both",
      low_income & !low_edu ~ "Low income only",
      !low_income & low_edu ~ "Low education only",
      TRUE ~ "Neither"
    )
  )
```

```{r map of educ and income, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

pal_combined <- colorFactor(
  palette = c(
    "Both" = "#e67e22",
    "Low income only" = "#2c7a5e",
    "Low education only" = "#1a3a5c",
    "Neither" = "#d0cfc9"
  ),
  domain = il_combined$category
)

il_combined <- st_transform(il_combined, crs = 4326)

leaflet(il_combined, options = leafletOptions(scrollWheelZoom = FALSE)) %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal_combined(category),
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    color = "white",
    weight = 0.5,
    label = ~ifelse(category != "Neither",
                    paste0(county, ": ", category),
                    NA)
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    pal = pal_combined,
   values = ~category[category != "Neither"],
    title = "County Profile",
    position = "bottomright"
  ) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender("
    function(el, x) {
      var title = document.createElement('div');
      title.innerHTML = '<div style=\"position:absolute;top:10px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;color:#1a1916;z-index:999;white-space:nowrap;\">Low Income and Low Education Counties in Illinois</div>';
      el.appendChild(title.firstChild);
    }
  ")
```
